global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent game title and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encourages users to start playing with enticing rewards.

elements.label: Game Title
elements.description: The text 'IronQuest' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Reward Message
elements.description: The text 'Win epic rewards No ads in first week' is large and clear, positioned centrally with a friendly tone.

elements.label: Game Icons
elements.description: Three circular game icons are arranged in a row, each with a simple design and a light background.

elements.label: Gameplay Preview
elements.description: A section showing a gameplay preview with a circular element indicating interaction, set against a blue background.

elements.label: Call to Action
elements.description: The button 'Start now' is bold and inviting, located at the bottom of the ad with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Additional Icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned at the top right, adding a decorative touch to the layout.
